mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relative_patient_relation (relative_id, patient_id, relation_type, is_legal_proxy) VALUES (#{relativeId}, #{patientId}, #{relationType}, #{isLegalProxy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, relative_id, patient_id, relation_type, is_legal_proxy, created_at FROM relative_patient_relation ORDER BY id

SELECT p.id AS patientId, p.patient_name AS patientName, p.bed_number AS bedNumber, p.admission_no AS admissionNo, r.relation_type AS relationType, r.is_legal_proxy AS isLegalProxy, p.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName FROM relative_patient_relation r JOIN patient p ON p.id = r.patient_id JOIN hospital_department d ON d.id = p.dept_id WHERE r.relative_id = #{relativeId} ORDER BY r.id
